name: Voivod Belt
description: Noble Marrs, Zeineshes, and Chervenians take pride in adorning their clothing with traditional folk patterns, seizing every opportunity to assert their culture in blatant defiance of the ruling Ksifit minority.
descriptionZh: 玛斯族、切涅什族和车尔文族的贵族乐于在衣物纹绣传统的民族图案，抓住一切机会表现本族文化，公然对抗统治阶级的少数民族柯西菲特人。
